## 🛑 Wait! Please read before submitting

Thank you for using the Ghostfolio Home Assistant Integration! 

As noted in the **[Support & Disclaimer](../README.md#support--disclaimer)** section of the documentation, this is a personal project provided strictly "as is". **The author does not provide 1-on-1 technical support, setup assistance, or troubleshooting guidance for local environments.**

### What you should do instead:

1. **Read the Documentation:** Please double-check the [README](../README.md) to ensure your configuration is correct.
2. **Talk to an AI:** If you are stuck, encountering errors, or need help writing Home Assistant automations, it is highly recommended to consult your preferred AI (such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini). 

**Pro-tip:** Copy and paste the following into an AI to get the best help:
> *"I am using a Custom Integration in Home Assistant. Here is my current YAML configuration: [paste YAML]. I am getting the following error in my logs: [paste logs]. How can I fix this?"*

---

## ✅ Acknowledgment
- [ ] I understand that the author does not provide technical support and I am expected to use the documentation and AI tools to troubleshoot my setup.

*(If you still believe you have found a genuine bug in the integration's code, please close this issue and open a **Bug Report** instead).*
